title: E. coli Optical Quantification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aqcik","text":"This procedure details how to culture E. coli K-12 in suspension and quantify cultured  bacteria using a spectrometer.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":38,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"29r63","text":"Labcoat and gloves must be worn at all times.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8dp8m","text":"Gloves","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5b126","text":"Lyophilized E. coli K-12","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":12,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4el5b","text":"BHI Broth","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"487n0","text":"15 mL centrifuge tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdt27","text":"Pipette and tips","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"duh45","text":"70% Ethanol solution","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dq2pf","text":"Kimwipes®","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cvj8q","text":"Mini Spectrometer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6j7iu","text":"Cuvettes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7oic","text":"Computer with OceanView software","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pipette 10 mL BHI broth into 15 mL centrifuge tube.
Place tube in incubator or water bath to warm.
Add 2 mg lyophilized E. coli K-12 to warm BHI broth.
Dispense 1 mL BHI broth into cuvette. This should be broth without bacteria and will serve as your reference for calculating absorbance.
Carefully insert cuvette into spectrometer. Wipe cuvette with delicate task wipes if necessary.
Repeat Steps 6-8 with the samples cultured for different durations. Avoid pipetting any precipitation at the bottom of the culture tube. Draw only supernatant.
Using the BHI broth without bacteria as I 0, calculate the absorbance of each of the samples.
Plot Absorbance as a function of time cultured. Include this plot, and the table of intensities and calculated absorbances in the 'Results' section of your lab report.
creator: Kenneth Schackart
